case_title: SANCHEZ, MARIA VS CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, DEPT. OF PARKING & et al

docket_entries.description: THE PLAINTIFF REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE SUBMITTED TO THE COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL. DATE REQUESTED: NOVEMBER 17, 2000 AT 3:30 PM.PLTF.PAID FEE OF $10.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY SANCHEZ, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, DEPT. OF PARKING & THE CITY TOW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-13-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THIS CLAIM IS AGAINST A GOVERNMENT AGENCY.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, DEPT. OF PARKING &
CIVIL SUBPOENA FILED. THERE'S NO NAME OF SUBPOENA PARTY, NO PROOF OF SERVICE ATTACHED, THERE'S NO SEAL ON SUBPOENA FORM AND THERE'S NO SIGNATURE.
EXHIBT A-B-C- FROM PLAINTIFF ON FILE.
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS, DEPT. OF PARKING & TRAFFIC
CIVIL SUBPOENA, AS TO CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS, DEPT. OF PARKING & TRAFFIC, FILED TOGETHER WITH PROOF OF SERVICE.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, DEPT. OF PARKING & THE CITY TOW SETTLED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-13-2000, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO NOV-17-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLFT'S MEMORANDUM FILED, SENT TO COURT TO BE ADDED TO DEFTS DECL.
